title: Apple Stores
body:
Apple Stores!

 

The one thing you've always secretly wanted in Minecraft! (whether you knew it or not...)  They generate anywhere in the Overworld, and you'll find quite a few of them.

 

-- V1.4.0 --

Added a villager profession (iPhone Salesman)
iPhone Salesman profession set using Blue Glazed Terracotta.

-- V1.3.2 --

Fixed a bug.

-- V1.3.1 --

Changed the blast radius from harvesting titanium.

-- V1.3.0 --

Smelting an iPhone now allows you to harvest its titanium, but it is dangerous!
New titanium armor set and tools.

-- V1.2.0 --

Added the MacBook.
The MacBook is a craftable weapon with a lot of attack damage but is slow and can't be used many times.

-- V1.1.0 --

Added the iPhone
You can now rob the Apple Stores, giving you an achievement.
